tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
Capo 3rd fret

To really get the right 'feel' for the strumming pattern, try delaying the down-strum 
which gives an arpeggio effect - like done in the original.

Chords:
[ch]D[/ch]      x00232
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]  xx0233
[ch]Em7[/ch]    022033
[ch]G[/ch]      320033
[ch]Bm[/ch]     x24432
[ch]Bm/A[/ch]   x04432
[ch]A7[/ch]     x02020
[ch]A7sus4[/ch] x04030
[ch]Em/G[/ch]   x05050

[Verse 1]
